proposals.title: OpenClaw optimization and storage health check
proposals.decision_if_pass: Keep autonomous loop enabled and proceed to regression/science execution.
proposals.decision_if_fail: Stop long campaigns and remediate memory/compaction/governance setup first.

proposals.title: MCP target discovery and availability snapshot
proposals.decision_if_pass: Permit compute-routed jobs and full budget scheduling when available.
proposals.decision_if_fail: Force LOCAL_ONLY mode and constrain exploration budget to safe defaults.

proposals.title: OpenClaw optimization fallback thresholds check
proposals.decision_if_pass: Classify platform as conditionally usable and prioritize remediation of strict-threshold gaps.
proposals.decision_if_fail: Classify platform readiness as rejected and halt autonomous expansion.

proposals.title: Claim 3 Option-B regression stability check
proposals.decision_if_pass: Maintain supported Claim 3 status and continue with current model family assumptions.
proposals.decision_if_fail: Downgrade Claim 3 support and prioritize model-robustness follow-up tests.

proposals.title: Claim 2 seed perturbation regression check
proposals.decision_if_pass: Keep Claim 2 marked stable under seed variation.
proposals.decision_if_fail: Mark Claim 2 as unstable and require expanded seed coverage before promotion.

proposals.title: Claim 3P cyclic Ising branch check at L=8
proposals.decision_if_pass: Increase confidence that Claim 3P model-selection failures are boundary-robust.
proposals.decision_if_fail: Keep Claim 3P underdetermined/rejected and prioritize falsifier-specific ablations.

proposals.title: Claim 3P cyclic Heisenberg branch check at L=8
proposals.decision_if_pass: Strengthen cross-model evidence that Claim 3P behavior is reproducible.
proposals.decision_if_fail: Constrain interpretation and document model-specific divergence.

proposals.title: Claim 3P larger-system check at L=16
proposals.decision_if_pass: Promote L-scaling evidence quality for Claim 3P trend interpretation.
proposals.decision_if_fail: Preserve conservative status and defer stronger claims.

selected.title: Claim 2 seed perturbation regression check
selected.decision_if_pass: Keep Claim 2 marked stable under seed variation.
selected.decision_if_fail: Mark Claim 2 as unstable and require expanded seed coverage before promotion.

selected.title: Claim 3 Option-B regression stability check
selected.decision_if_pass: Maintain supported Claim 3 status and continue with current model family assumptions.
selected.decision_if_fail: Downgrade Claim 3 support and prioritize model-robustness follow-up tests.

stop_condition.note: Time remained while only Tier C work was queued. Budget reallocated to Tier A hardening tasks.
